title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of March 14, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here, Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners, SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP Ariba has launched its next-generation platform, leveraging AI for intelligent procurement. This update builds the foundation for a more efficient and automated procurement process.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP has announced its 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners globally. The awards highlight partners that have excelled in delivering value to customers.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary: SAP introduces Distributed Energy Resources to facilitate energy flexibility market. It enables data orchestration for utilities to unlock value from distributed energy resources.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies now prioritize seamless customer experiences across the entire sales process. This shift matters as it directly impacts customer loyalty and business revenue.
